1800→=== Authentication Regime (RBRA)
  1801→
  1802→[[rbra_regime]]
  1803→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_regime axf_bash⟧
  1804→{rbra_regime}::
  1805→An
  1806→regime
  1807→that contains
  1808→{giam_service_account}
  1809→credentials and authentication material for secure access to
  1810→{gcp_service}
  1811→APIs.
  1812→RBRA regimes are security-isolated configuration files typically stored outside the main repository in `../station-files/secrets/rbra-*.env` locations.
  1813→These regimes enable different service account roles to authenticate and operate within their designated scopes.
  1814→
  1815→An
  1816→{rbtgi_rbra_file}
  1817→is a credentials file containing the minimum identity and signing material needed for
  1818→{at_recipe_bottle}
  1819→tools to authenticate to
  1820→{gcp_service}
  1821→via
  1822→{giam_service_account}.
  1823→
  1824→[[rbra_client_email]]
  1825→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_service_account⟧
  1826→{rbra_client_email}::
  1827→The
  1828→{giam_service_account}
  1829→email address assigned by
  1830→{gcp_service},
  1831→used as the issuer (`iss`) when constructing JWTs for OAuth2 token exchange.
  1832→
  1833→[[rbra_private_key]]
  1834→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtu_string⟧
  1835→{rbra_private_key}::
  1836→The PEM-encoded RSA private key material corresponding to the
  1837→{giam_service_account}.
  1838→Stored as a literal multi-line string with `\n` sequences that are expanded when signing JWTs.
  1839→Used only in memory at runtime; never written separately to disk.
  1840→
  1841→[[rbra_project_id]]
  1842→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_project_id⟧
  1843→{rbra_project_id}::
  1844→The
  1845→{gcp_service}
  1846→{gcp_project_id}
  1847→that owns the
  1848→{giam_service_account}.
  1849→Provides scope for all API operations since a
  1850→{giam_service_account}
  1851→can only act within its parent project's boundaries unless granted cross-project roles.
  1852→
  1853→NOTE: Individual RBRA variables beyond the core documented set are actively used throughout the system but formal definition within this specification is TBD for future documentation efforts.
  1854→
  1855→=== Payor Regime (RBRP)
  1856→
  1857→The
  1858→{rbtr_payor}
  1859→regime
  1860→defines configuration for the administrative layer that manages
  1861→{at_recipe_bottle}
  1862→infrastructure.
  1863→These settings control how the
  1864→{rbtr_payor}
  1865→creates and manages
  1866→{rbtgi_depot_project}
  1867→instances.
  1868→
  1869→[[rbrp_regime]]
  1870→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_regime axf_bash⟧
  1871→{rbrp_regime}::
  1872→An
  1873→regime
  1874→that contains configuration for the administrative
  1875→{rbtr_payor}
  1876→layer managing
  1877→{at_recipe_bottle}
  1878→infrastructure.
  1879→RBRP regimes define payor project identification, billing account linkage, OAuth client configuration, and depot project tracking arrays that enable infrastructure lifecycle management.
  1880→
  1881→[[rbrp_payor_project_id]]
  1882→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_project_id⟧
  1883→{rbrp_payor_project_id}::
  1884→The
  1885→{gcp_service}
  1886→{gcp_project_id}
  1887→that hosts the OAuth 2.0 client configuration for
  1888→{rbtr_payor}
  1889→operations.
  1890→This
  1891→{gcp_project_id}
  1892→must exist before Recipe Bottle initialization and serves as the administrative control plane.
  1893→
  1894→[[rbrp_billing_account_id]]
  1895→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_billing_account⟧
  1896→{rbrp_billing_account_id}::
  1897→The
  1898→{gcp_service}
  1899→billing account identifier that the
  1900→{rbtr_payor}
  1901→links to newly created
  1902→{rbtgi_depot_project}
  1903→instances.
  1904→Format: XXXXXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXX.
  1905→
  1906→[[rbrp_oauth_client_id]]
  1907→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtu_string⟧
  1908→{rbrp_oauth_client_id}::
  1909→The public OAuth 2.0 client identifier for the
  1910→{rbtr_payor}
  1911→desktop application.
  1912→
  1913→[[rbrp_depot_project_ids]]
  1914→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_project_id axd_repeated⟧
  1915→{rbrp_depot_project_ids}::
  1916→Space-delimited array of active depot project IDs managed by this
  1917→{rbtr_payor}.
  1918→
  1919→=== OAuth Regime (RBRO)
  1920→
  1921→The OAuth
  1922→regime
  1923→stores sensitive OAuth credentials locally for
  1924→{rbtr_payor}
  1925→authentication.
  1926→
  1927→[[rbro_regime]]
  1928→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_regime axf_bash⟧
  1929→{rbro_regime}::
  1930→An
  1931→regime
  1932→containing OAuth client credentials and refresh tokens for
  1933→{rbtr_payor}
  1934→operations.
  1935→Stored in `~/.rbw/rbro.env` with 600 permissions, never committed to version control.
  1936→
  1937→[[rbro_client_secret]]
  1938→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtu_string⟧
  1939→{rbro_client_secret}::
  1940→The OAuth 2.0 client secret from the Google Cloud Console OAuth client configuration.
  1941→
  1942→[[rbro_refresh_token]]
  1943→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtu_string⟧
  1944→{rbro_refresh_token}::
  1945→The long-lived OAuth refresh token obtained during the authorization flow, used to obtain fresh access tokens.
  1946→
  1947→=== Kit Regime Operations (RBK)
  1948→
  1949→[[rbkro_broach]]
  1950→// ⟦axvr_broach⟧
  1951→{rbkro_broach}::
  1952→Silent initialization of Recipe Bottle regime state from
  1953→{axrg_assignment_s}.
  1954→Sets defaults, detects unexpected variables, builds derived structures.
  1955→
  1956→[[rbkro_validate]]
  1957→// ⟦axvr_validate⟧
  1958→{rbkro_validate}::
  1959→Strict field validation for Recipe Bottle
  1960→{axrg_regime_s}.
  1961→Checks all type and constraint requirements via buv_env_* validators.
  1962→
  1963→[[rbkro_render]]
  1964→// ⟦axvr_render⟧
  1965→{rbkro_render}::
  1966→Diagnostic display of Recipe Bottle
  1967→{axrg_regime}
  1968→state.
  1969→Renders all fields before validation so complete state is visible on failure.
  1970→
  1971→=== Kit Regime Operations (BUK)
  1972→
  1973→[[bukro_broach]]
  1974→// ⟦axvr_broach⟧
  1975→{bukro_broach}::
  1976→Silent initialization of Bash Utility Kit regime state from
  1977→{axrg_assignment_s}.
  1978→Sets defaults, detects unexpected variables, builds derived structures.
  1979→
  1980→[[bukro_validate]]
  1981→// ⟦axvr_validate⟧
  1982→{bukro_validate}::
  1983→Strict field validation for Bash Utility Kit
  1984→{axrg_regime_s}.
  1985→Checks all type and constraint requirements via buv_env_* validators.
  1986→
  1987→[[bukro_render]]
  1988→// ⟦axvr_render⟧
  1989→{bukro_render}::
  1990→Diagnostic display of Bash Utility Kit
  1991→{axrg_regime}
  1992→state.
  1993→Renders all fields before validation so complete state is visible on failure.
  1994→
  1995→=== Vessel Regime (RBRV)
  1996→
  1997→[[rbrv_regime]]
  1998→// ⟦axvr_regime axf_bash axrd_file_sourced⟧
  1999→{rbrv_regime}::
  2000→Configuration regime for container image build specifications.
  2001→
  2002→[[rbrv_sigil]]
  2003→// ⟦axvr_variable axd_required rbst_xname⟧
  2004→{rbrv_sigil}::
  2005→Vessel identifier for
  2006→{rbrv_regime};
  2007→basis for directory and ark naming.
  2008→
  2009→[[rbrv_description]]
  2010→// ⟦axvr_variable axd_optional rbst_description⟧
  2011→{rbrv_description}::
  2012→Human-readable documentation for
  2013→{rbrv_regime}.
  2014→
  2015→[[rbrv_vessel_mode]]
  2016→// ⟦axvr_variable axd_required axt_enumeration⟧
  2017→{rbrv_vessel_mode}::
  2018→Build mode for
  2019→{rbrv_regime}.
  2020→Determines which variable group is active.
  2021→
  2022→[[rbrv_vessel_mode_bind]]
  2023→// ⟦axl_voices axt_enum_value⟧
  2024→{rbrv_vessel_mode_bind}::
  2025→Selects binding configuration: vessel uses an existing upstream image.
  2026→
  2027→[[rbrv_vessel_mode_conjure]]
  2028→// ⟦axl_voices axt_enum_value⟧

  2031→
  2032→[[rbrv_group_binding]]
  2033→// ⟦axvr_group axd_conditional⟧

  2037→
  2038→[[rbrv_group_conjuring]]
  2039→// ⟦axvr_group axd_conditional⟧
  2040→{rbrv_group_conjuring}::
  2041→Variables for conjuring vessels within
  2042→{rbrv_regime}.
  2043→
  2044→[[rbrv_bind_image]]
  2045→// ⟦axvr_variable axd_required rbst_image_ref⟧
  2046→{rbrv_bind_image}::

  2051→[[rbrv_conjure_dockerfile]]

  2058→[[rbrv_conjure_bldcontext]]

  2065→[[rbrv_conjure_platforms]]

  2072→[[rbrv_conjure_binfmt_policy]]

  2089→=== Nameplate Regime (RBRN)
  2090→
  2091→[[rbrn_regime]]

  2122→[[rbrn_sentry_vessel]]

  2127→[[rbrn_sentry_consecration]]

  2132→[[rbrn_bottle_vessel]]

  2137→[[rbrn_bottle_consecration]]

  2142→[[rbrn_entry_mode]]

1800→=== Authentication Regime (RBRA)
  1801→
  1802→[[rbra_regime]]
  1803→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_regime axf_bash⟧
  1804→{rbra_regime}::
  1805→An
  1806→regime
  1807→that contains
  1808→{giam_service_account}
  1809→credentials and authentication material for secure access to
  1810→{gcp_service}
  1811→APIs.
  1812→RBRA regimes are security-isolated configuration files typically stored outside the main repository in `../station-files/secrets/rbra-*.env` locations.
  1813→These regimes enable different service account roles to authenticate and operate within their designated scopes.
  1814→
  1815→An
  1816→{rbtgi_rbra_file}
  1817→is a credentials file containing the minimum identity and signing material needed for
  1818→{at_recipe_bottle}
  1819→tools to authenticate to
  1820→{gcp_service}
  1821→via
  1822→{giam_service_account}.
  1823→
  1824→[[rbra_client_email]]
  1825→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_service_account⟧
  1826→{rbra_client_email}::
  1827→The
  1828→{giam_service_account}
  1829→email address assigned by
  1830→{gcp_service},
  1831→used as the issuer (`iss`) when constructing JWTs for OAuth2 token exchange.
  1832→
  1833→[[rbra_private_key]]
  1834→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtu_string⟧
  1835→{rbra_private_key}::
  1836→The PEM-encoded RSA private key material corresponding to the
  1837→{giam_service_account}.
  1838→Stored as a literal multi-line string with `\n` sequences that are expanded when signing JWTs.
  1839→Used only in memory at runtime; never written separately to disk.
  1840→
  1841→[[rbra_project_id]]
  1842→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_project_id⟧
  1843→{rbra_project_id}::
  1844→The
  1845→{gcp_service}
  1846→{gcp_project_id}
  1847→that owns the
  1848→{giam_service_account}.
  1849→Provides scope for all API operations since a
  1850→{giam_service_account}
  1851→can only act within its parent project's boundaries unless granted cross-project roles.
  1852→
  1853→NOTE: Individual RBRA variables beyond the core documented set are actively used throughout the system but formal definition within this specification is TBD for future documentation efforts.
  1854→
  1855→=== Payor Regime (RBRP)
  1856→
  1857→The
  1858→{rbtr_payor}
  1859→regime
  1860→defines configuration for the administrative layer that manages
  1861→{at_recipe_bottle}
  1862→infrastructure.
  1863→These settings control how the
  1864→{rbtr_payor}
  1865→creates and manages
  1866→{rbtgi_depot_project}
  1867→instances.
  1868→
  1869→[[rbrp_regime]]
  1870→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_regime axf_bash⟧
  1871→{rbrp_regime}::
  1872→An
  1873→regime
  1874→that contains configuration for the administrative
  1875→{rbtr_payor}
  1876→layer managing
  1877→{at_recipe_bottle}
  1878→infrastructure.
  1879→RBRP regimes define payor project identification, billing account linkage, OAuth client configuration, and depot project tracking arrays that enable infrastructure lifecycle management.
  1880→
  1881→[[rbrp_payor_project_id]]
  1882→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_project_id⟧
  1883→{rbrp_payor_project_id}::
  1884→The
  1885→{gcp_service}
  1886→{gcp_project_id}
  1887→that hosts the OAuth 2.0 client configuration for
  1888→{rbtr_payor}
  1889→operations.
  1890→This
  1891→{gcp_project_id}
  1892→must exist before Recipe Bottle initialization and serves as the administrative control plane.
  1893→
  1894→[[rbrp_billing_account_id]]
  1895→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_billing_account⟧
  1896→{rbrp_billing_account_id}::
  1897→The
  1898→{gcp_service}
  1899→billing account identifier that the
  1900→{rbtr_payor}
  1901→links to newly created
  1902→{rbtgi_depot_project}
  1903→instances.
  1904→Format: XXXXXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXX.
  1905→
  1906→[[rbrp_oauth_client_id]]
  1907→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtu_string⟧
  1908→{rbrp_oauth_client_id}::
  1909→The public OAuth 2.0 client identifier for the
  1910→{rbtr_payor}
  1911→desktop application.
  1912→
  1913→[[rbrp_depot_project_ids]]
  1914→// ⟦axl_voices axrg_variable axtg_project_id axd_repeated⟧
  1915→{rbrp_depot_project_ids}::
